passwordReset.subject: Reset your Relativa password
passwordReset.title: Reset your password
passwordReset.body:
Hi {0},

We received a request to reset the password for your Relativa account. Click the button below to choose a new password. This link expires in 1 hour.
passwordReset.linkHelp: Or copy and paste this link into your browser:
passwordReset.footer: If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email. Your password will not change.
emailVerification.subject: Your Relativa verification code
emailVerification.title: Verify your email
emailVerification.body:
Hi {0},

Welcome to Relativa. Enter the code below to confirm your email address. It expires in 15 minutes.
emailVerification.footer: This code was requested during sign-up. If it wasn't you, you can safely ignore this email.
smsVerification.body: Relativa: your verification code is {0}. It expires in 15 minutes.
addEmail.subject: Confirm your email address
addEmail.title: Confirm this email
addEmail.body:
Hi {0},

Enter the code below to add this email address to your Relativa account. It expires in 15 minutes.
addEmail.footer: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.
